source.title: Epilepsies in children, young people and adults
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with suspected or established epilepsy.
source.setting: Primary, specialist, emergency, and ongoing epilepsy care.
source.exclusions: Exact for epilepsy assessment, monitoring, information, emergency planning, and risk review; international only and local driving, referral, and prescribing rules require UAE review.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 2.1.1–2.1.11 — information, safety, and daily impact

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers
